---
name: Style
about: Formatting, missing semicolons, etc.; no code meaning change (style:)
---

## Summary

<!-- e.g. formatter upgrade, lint rule adoption, whitespace only -->

## Commits

Use **`style:`** or **`style(scope):`**, e.g. `style: apply prettier to scripts`.

## Checklist

- [ ] No intentional behavior changes
- [ ] CI / lint passes
